text.title: Collaborative Group Build Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from validated spec to a running CollaborativeGroup with budget guard.

section.title: Procedure
section.code:
STEP 1 — Configure input: multi-agent spec with pattern=collaborative action: instantiate CollaborativeGroup(contributors, synthesizer, max_iterations, token_budget, workspace_writer) output: instance ready to run gate: validator (scripts/validate-multi-agent-collaborative.py) green
STEP 2 — Initial brainstorm action: for each contributor, send task prompt; capture {agent, iteration=0, content, ts} to workspace output: workspace populated with one entry per contributor gate: used_tokens recorded; abort if used ≥ 0.9 × token_budget
STEP 3 — Iterate (rounds 1..max_iterations) action: per round, per contributor: build prompt = task + own latest + others' latest (capped ~3k tok); send; append result to workspace; recompute used_tokens; break loop if ≥ 0.9 × token_budget output: workspace[1..N×iterations] entries gate: max_iterations not exceeded AND token budget not breached
STEP 4 — Synthesize action: single call to synthesizer with ALL latest contributions (per agent) simultaneously output: synthesized final_result gate: synthesizer.name not in contributors[*].name
STEP 5 — Emit trace action: write trace.json with {config, workspace, final_result, used_tokens, aborted_early: bool} output: replayable trace for debugging gate: trace.aborted_early consistent with budget guard
